title: Cx authority-flow graph for capability routing and ambient-effect denial

capability_bits.denied_when_missing: Task creation APIs are unavailable at the type level unless Caps implements HasSpawn.
Timer-driver access returns None when the runtime mask removes time authority.
Entropy authority is not part of web, background, pure, or default restricted capability rows.
I/O and fetch capability accessors return None when the runtime mask removes I/O authority.
Remote capability access returns None when the runtime mask removes remote authority.

context_rows.construction_path: runtime-owned full context or test-only constructor
context_rows.public_use: Task entry points and runtime-owned code that require full authority.

context_rows.construction_path: WebContext::new narrows from a capability superset through narrow()
context_rows.public_use: Web request handlers: time and I/O, without spawn, random, or remote authority.

context_rows.construction_path: GrpcContext::new narrows from a capability superset through narrow()
context_rows.public_use: Streaming RPC handlers that need structured child work plus time and I/O.

context_rows.construction_path: BackgroundContext::new narrows from a capability superset through narrow()
context_rows.public_use: Background tasks that may spawn children and use time but cannot perform I/O, entropy, or remote effects.

context_rows.construction_path: Cx values may be narrowed to PureCaps
context_rows.public_use: Pure computations and examples where effect APIs should be unavailable.

context_rows.construction_path: Cx values may be narrowed to EntropyCaps
context_rows.public_use: Entropy-only boundaries that must not inherit spawn, time, I/O, or remote effects.

flow_edges.claim: Runtime-owned construction may produce full authority.
WebContext narrows to time plus I/O.
GrpcContext narrows to spawn plus time plus I/O.
BackgroundContext narrows to spawn plus time.
Restricting to NoCaps removes every runtime-mask bit and blocks ambient effect accessors.
Cx::current() returns a clone carrying the innermost restriction mask, not an unrestricted ambient context.

denied_examples.expected_denial: compile-time missing HasIo bound or runtime accessor returns None after restriction

denied_examples.attempt: Call Cx::current() inside set_current_restricted and then request Cx::remote()
denied_examples.expected_denial: runtime mask blocks remote and Cx::remote() returns None

denied_examples.attempt: Use background task context as an I/O authority

validation.rch_command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_cx_authority_flow_graph CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-D warnings -C debuginfo=0' cargo test -p asupersync --test cx_authority_flow_graph_contract -- --nocapture

no_claims: does not prove static whole-program security
does not prove runtime correctness outside the cited Cx capability surfaces
does not replace authority-flow adversarial tests or capability-token audits
does not prove broad workspace health, release readiness, or live RCH fleet availability
does not claim all application examples use the least-privilege wrapper
